_meta.purpose: Registry of FileMaker apps the shared viewer can render. Add an app here and it appears in the launcher; no viewer code changes needed.

apps.name: HML_LLC
apps.desc: Hard money loan servicing. Reference implementation of the repo-native FileMaker doc standard.

apps.name: URITP People
apps.desc: Identity hub for the URITP FileMaker package. Lean canonical person record; every spoke app references it. Hub-and-spoke.
